feed.title: SAP Community - Cloud Integration
feed.subtitle: Cloud Integration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Remove SOAP envelope and namespace prefix using XSLT mapping in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Sapians,

Sometimes, we encountered an issue where CPI is getting data from SOAP sender channel which have SOAP envelope and namespace prefix in it and we face issue while processing that. Especially if we need to route the flow as per the condition. In that case, we need to read the value coming in SOAP fields and process further. The XML condition of router will not get processed until the SOAP envelope and namespace prefix are removed.

To resolve this issue, we can use XSLT mapping which can remove the entire SOAP envelope and namespace prefix to process further in SAP CPI.

Sample SOAP payload :

<?xml version="1.0"?>
<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope" soap:encodingStyle="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-encoding">
<soap:Body>
<m:GetPrice xmlns:m="https://www.w3schools.com/prices">
<m:Item>Apples</m:Item>
<m:Price>110</m:Price>
</m:GetPrice>
</soap:Body>
</soap:Envelope>

XSLT mapping to remove namespace and prefix.

<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
<xsl:output method="xml" omit-xml-declaration="yes" />
<xsl:template match="/|comment()|processing-instruction()">
<xsl:copy>
<xsl:apply-templates />
</xsl:copy>
</xsl:template>
<xsl:template match="*">
<xsl:element name="{local-name()}">
<xsl:apply-templates select="@*|node()" />
</xsl:element>
</xsl:template>
<xsl:template match="@*">
<xsl:attribute name="{local-name()}">
<xsl:value-of select="." />
</xsl:attribute>
</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

 

Output payload :

 

<Envelope encodingStyle="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-encoding">
    <Body>
        <GetPrice>
            <Item>Apples</Item>
            <Price>110</Price>
        </GetPrice>
    </Body>
</Envelope>
 

This conclude the blog😊, with this the SOAP envelope and namespace prefix will be removed in SAP CPI.

In case of any queries, please comment down. Will try to resolve your concerns😊.

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite - Message Mapping - addContextChange in UDF is ignored
entry.content:
Hi expterts,

I am trying to merge several single values into one structure using an UDF with the addContextChange function.
Unfortunately it does not work as expected. 

My source structure look similar to this all with occurence 0..1:
[...]
costCenter1 
costCenter2
costCenter3
percentage1
percantage2
percentage3
[...]

Inside the target message I would like to group them in a structure like this:
[...]
costDistribution (0..*)
- costCenter (1..1)
- percentage (1..1)
[...]

To map the values I am using an UDF function:
def void costDistribution(String[] costCenter1, String[] costCenter2, String[] costCenter3, String[] percentage1, String[] percentage2, String[] percentage3, Output parentNode, Output costCenters, Output percentages, MappingContext context){ ... }

For test purposes I tried this with static values to get a feeling for the context change function and tried this:
parentNode.addValue("004025235")
costCenters.addValue("004025235")
percentages.addValue("80")

parentNode.addContextChange()
costCenters.addContextChange()
percentages.addContextChange()

parentNode.addValue("004025240")
costCenters.addValue("004025240")
percentages.addValue("20")

My expection in the target would be to have several costDistribution nodes with the corresponding values like this:
[...]
costDistribution
- costCenter 004025235
- percentage 80
costDistribution
- costCenter004025240
- percentage 20
[...]

In Reality the first block is generated. May someone explain me how I need to use the contextChange function to achieve the wanted structure?
Thank you all in advance.

Best regards

entry.title: Client certificate authentication for CPI to OnPrem HTTPS connection scenario
entry.content:
Hi

I have a requirement where I need to authenticate with an on-prem system using client certificates for the HTTPS receiver adapter.

HTTPS receiver adapter does not support client certificate authentication for proxy type on-prem.

How can I handle this requirement.

Regards,

Dileep S

entry.title: How Does the Integration of SAP S/4HANA Modules Enhance Operational Efficiency for Businesses?
entry.content:
How does the integration of the finance, supply chain, and production planning modules in the SAP S/4HANA platform optimize data flow and decision-making processes? What are the advantages provided by this integration?

https://www.researchgate.net/spotlight/67f7c456fd4a6077420b6bfa

entry.title: SAP CPI - Unable to parse hcicertificate using KeystoreService
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to integrate CPI with Microsoft Entra ID using client certificate credential. I tried using SAP's hcicertificate keypair in groovy script like 

Certificate cert = keystoreService.getCertificate("hcicertificate")

ByteArrayInputStream certificateStream = new ByteArrayInputStream(cert.getEncoded())

TokenCredential credential = new ClientCertificateCredentialBuilder().clientId(clientId).tenantId(tenantId).pfxCertificate(certificateStream).build();

But getToken from credential gives this error - "Failed to parse the certificate for the credential: DER input, Integer tag error"

I read hcicertificate is X.509 and this error means incorrect certificate format used. I tried with different .pfx keypair too but got same error.

Please can anyone help?

entry.title: Intermittent Http_Communication_Failure Error in ABAP Using IF_HTTP_CLIENT->receive
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am intermittently encountering the exception Http_Communication_Failure in my ABAP code when using the method IF_HTTP_CLIENT->receive to send data to external systems (in my case, SAP CPI).

Upon analyzing the short dump, I noticed the following error message:
Connect to hostaddress:443 failed: NIECONN_REFUSED (-10),
and the system variable ME->M_ECODE has the value 411.

Has anyone experienced a similar issue or have any suggestions on how to resolve this?

Thanks in advance,
Ravi Bharti

entry.title: SAP Trail Integration suite trail version
entry.content:
hello,

 

I am getting black page when i open integration suite .

this is new trail version. 

all role collection i given to my user. Screen shot is follows.

 

regards,

Yasmin.

entry.title: How to divide XML message records (node) wise and post it one by one to a REST API using SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a scenario in SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) where I'm fetching project data from SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public Edition) using an OData call. The response XML contains multiple <entry> records, each representing a project.

<feed xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom" xmlns:m="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices" xml:base="https://my******-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_PROJECTDETAILS_API_CDS/">
    <id>https://-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_PROJECTDETAILS_API_CDS/YY1_ProjectDetails_API</id>
    <title type="text">YY1_ProjectDetails_API</title>
    <updated>2025-04-07T05:59:03Z</updated>
    <author>
        <name/>
    </author>
    <link href="YY1_ProjectDetails_API" rel="self" title="YY1_ProjectDetails_API"/>
    <entry>
        <id>https://my*****-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_PROJECTDETAILS_API_CDS/YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-b7a8-9f7fe6c49bb6')</id>
        <title type="text">YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-b7a8-9f7fe6c49bb6')</title>
        <updated>2025-04-07T05:59:03Z</updated>
        <category term="YY1_PROJECTDETAILS_API_CDS.YY1_ProjectDetails_APIType" scheme="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/scheme"/>
        <link href="YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-b7a8-9f7fe6c49bb6')" rel="self" title="YY1_ProjectDetails_APIType"/>
        <link href="YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-b7a8-9f7fe6c49bb6')/to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH" rel="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/related/to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH" type="application/atom+xml;type=entry" title="to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH"/>
        <content type="application/xml">
            <m:properties xmlns:m="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices">
                <d:ProjectUUID>b702a842-56ed-1eef-b7a8-9f7fe6c49bb6</d:ProjectUUID>
                <d:ProjectDescription>Adaptive 26/11 Prd Dev</d:ProjectDescription>
                <d:Project>E-91-ARA-PRD-2611</d:Project>
                <d:ProjectStartDate>2024-12-01T00:00:00</d:ProjectStartDate>
                <d:ProjectEndDate>2052-04-16T00:00:00</d:ProjectEndDate>
                <d:ProfitCenter>9150A30000</d:ProfitCenter>
                <d:CompanyCode>2000</d:CompanyCode>
                <d:ResponsibleCostCenter>9150A30000</d:ResponsibleCostCenter>
                <d:ProjectStatus>Created</d:ProjectStatus>
                <d:Person>9980000001</d:Person>
                <d:PersonFullName>User A</d:PersonFullName>
                <d:ProjectRoleName>Project Financial Controller</d:ProjectRoleName>
                <d:YY1_Customer2_PPH></d:YY1_Customer2_PPH>
                <d:YY1_IsSynced_PPH></d:YY1_IsSynced_PPH>
            </m:properties>
        </content>
    </entry>
    <entry>
        <id>https://my*****-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_PROJECTDETAILS_API_CDS/YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'33382281-a32f-1eef-b4b5-3d515802dbb0')</id>
        <title type="text">YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'33382281-a32f-1eef-b4b5-3d515802dbb0')</title>
        <updated>2025-04-07T05:59:03Z</updated>
        <category term="YY1_PROJECTDETAILS_API_CDS.YY1_ProjectDetails_APIType" scheme="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/scheme"/>
        <link href="YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'33382281-a32f-1eef-b4b5-3d515802dbb0')" rel="self" title="YY1_ProjectDetails_APIType"/>
        <link href="YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'33382281-a32f-1eef-b4b5-3d515802dbb0')/to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH" rel="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/related/to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH" type="application/atom+xml;type=entry" title="to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH"/>
        <content type="application/xml">
            <m:properties xmlns:m="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices">
                <d:ProjectUUID>33382281-a32f-1eef-b4b5-3d515802dbb0</d:ProjectUUID>
                <d:ProjectDescription>Customized Engineering with BMW</d:ProjectDescription>
                <d:Project>E-49-ENG-BMW-25</d:Project>
                <d:ProjectStartDate>2023-04-01T00:00:00</d:ProjectStartDate>
                <d:ProjectEndDate>2026-12-31T00:00:00</d:ProjectEndDate>
                <d:ProfitCenter>4960A00001</d:ProfitCenter>
                <d:CompanyCode>1000</d:CompanyCode>
                <d:ResponsibleCostCenter>4960A00001</d:ResponsibleCostCenter>
                <d:ProjectStatus>Released</d:ProjectStatus>
                <d:Person>9980000011</d:Person>
                <d:PersonFullName>Aakanksha</d:PersonFullName>
                <d:ProjectRoleName>Project Financial Controller</d:ProjectRoleName>
                <d:YY1_Customer2_PPH>1000023</d:YY1_Customer2_PPH>
                <d:YY1_IsSynced_PPH></d:YY1_IsSynced_PPH>
            </m:properties>
        </content>
    </entry>
    <entry>
        <id>https://my*****-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_PROJECTDETAILS_API_CDS/YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-b7a8-9f7fe6c49bb6')</id>
        <title type="text">YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-b7a8-9f7fe6c49bb6')</title>
        <updated>2025-04-07T05:59:03Z</updated>
        <category term="YY1_PROJECTDETAILS_API_CDS.YY1_ProjectDetails_APIType" scheme="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/scheme"/>
        <link href="YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-b7a8-9f7fe6c49bb6')" rel="self" title="YY1_ProjectDetails_APIType"/>
        <link href="YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-b7a8-9f7fe6c49bb6')/to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH" rel="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/related/to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH" type="application/atom+xml;type=entry" title="to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH"/>
        <content type="application/xml">
            <m:properties xmlns:m="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices">
                <d:ProjectUUID>b702a842-56ed-1eef-b7a8-9f7fe6c49bb6</d:ProjectUUID>
                <d:ProjectDescription>Adaptive 26/11 Prd Dev</d:ProjectDescription>
                <d:Project>E-91-ARA-PRD-2611</d:Project>
                <d:ProjectStartDate>2024-12-01T00:00:00</d:ProjectStartDate>
                <d:ProjectEndDate>2052-04-16T00:00:00</d:ProjectEndDate>
                <d:ProfitCenter>9150A30000</d:ProfitCenter>
                <d:CompanyCode>2000</d:CompanyCode>
                <d:ResponsibleCostCenter>9150A10000</d:ResponsibleCostCenter>
                <d:ProjectStatus>Created</d:ProjectStatus>
                <d:Person>9980000001</d:Person>
                <d:PersonFullName>User 2</d:PersonFullName>
                <d:ProjectRoleName>Project Financial Controller</d:ProjectRoleName>
                <d:YY1_Customer2_PPH></d:YY1_Customer2_PPH>
                <d:YY1_IsSynced_PPH></d:YY1_IsSynced_PPH>
            </m:properties>
        </content>
    </entry>
    <entry>
        <id>https://my*****-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_PROJECTDETAILS_API_CDS/YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-b79e-66c149a8dbb6')</id>
        <title type="text">YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-b79e-66c149a8dbb6')</title>
        <updated>2025-04-07T05:59:03Z</updated>
        <category term="YY1_PROJECTDETAILS_API_CDS.YY1_ProjectDetails_APIType" scheme="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/scheme"/>
        <link href="YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-b79e-66c149a8dbb6')" rel="self" title="YY1_ProjectDetails_APIType"/>
        <link href="YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-b79e-66c149a8dbb6')/to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH" rel="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/related/to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH" type="application/atom+xml;type=entry" title="to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH"/>
        <content type="application/xml">
            <m:properties xmlns:m="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices">
                <d:ProjectUUID>b702a842-56ed-1eef-b79e-66c149a8dbb6</d:ProjectUUID>
                <d:ProjectDescription>Developer Classic 2011</d:ProjectDescription>
                <d:Project>C-49-DEV-ARC-PRD-2011</d:Project>
                <d:ProjectStartDate>2024-03-31T00:00:00</d:ProjectStartDate>
                <d:ProjectEndDate>2099-12-01T00:00:00</d:ProjectEndDate>
                <d:ProfitCenter>4950A50000</d:ProfitCenter>
                <d:CompanyCode>1000</d:CompanyCode>
                <d:ResponsibleCostCenter>4950A50000</d:ResponsibleCostCenter>
                <d:ProjectStatus>Released</d:ProjectStatus>
                <d:Person>9980000011</d:Person>
                <d:PersonFullName>Aakanksha</d:PersonFullName>
                <d:ProjectRoleName>Project Financial Controller</d:ProjectRoleName>
                <d:YY1_Customer2_PPH></d:YY1_Customer2_PPH>
                <d:YY1_IsSynced_PPH></d:YY1_IsSynced_PPH>
            </m:properties>
        </content>
    </entry>
    <entry>
        <id>https://my*****-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_PROJECTDETAILS_API_CDS/YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-bad3-7eb2630a7bb6')</id>
        <title type="text">YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-bad3-7eb2630a7bb6')</title>
        <updated>2025-04-07T05:59:03Z</updated>
        <category term="YY1_PROJECTDETAILS_API_CDS.YY1_ProjectDetails_APIType" scheme="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/scheme"/>
        <link href="YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-bad3-7eb2630a7bb6')" rel="self" title="YY1_ProjectDetails_APIType"/>
        <link href="YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-bad3-7eb2630a7bb6')/to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH" rel="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/related/to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH" type="application/atom+xml;type=entry" title="to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH"/>
        <content type="application/xml">
            <m:properties xmlns:m="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices">
                <d:ProjectUUID>b702a842-56ed-1eef-bad3-7eb2630a7bb6</d:ProjectUUID>
                <d:ProjectDescription>Test Project</d:ProjectDescription>
                <d:Project>TESTPROJECT1</d:Project>
                <d:ProjectStartDate>2025-02-01T00:00:00</d:ProjectStartDate>
                <d:ProjectEndDate>2025-02-04T00:00:00</d:ProjectEndDate>
                <d:ProfitCenter>9150A10000</d:ProfitCenter>
                <d:CompanyCode>2000</d:CompanyCode>
                <d:ResponsibleCostCenter>9150A10000</d:ResponsibleCostCenter>
                <d:ProjectStatus>Released</d:ProjectStatus>
                <d:Person>9980000001</d:Person>
                <d:PersonFullName>User</d:PersonFullName>
                <d:ProjectRoleName>Project Financial Controller</d:ProjectRoleName>
                <d:YY1_Customer2_PPH></d:YY1_Customer2_PPH>
                <d:YY1_IsSynced_PPH></d:YY1_IsSynced_PPH>
            </m:properties>
        </content>
    </entry>
</feed>

The requirement is to send each project record individually to a third-party REST API (3rd Party HRMS), which only accepts one record per request in application/x-www-form-urlencoded format with the key name inputData.

I tried using Iterating Splitter, but I am not getting the expected behavior — it's not making separate HTTP calls or invoking the Request Reply as intended.

My goal is:

  • Fetch XML containing multiple projects

  • Split it into individual messages (each project)

  • Send one-by-one using a Request Reply step to the API

  • Handle and log each response if needed

    Any step-by-step help, example flow, or blog reference would be highly appreciated.

    Thanks in advance! 
    Best regards,
    Prathmesh Sutar

entry.title: CPI Custom Adapter development
entry.content:
Hello

I'm working on a custom adapter for CPI

I'm already using Archetype and Camel version 3

I was able to make ir work but there is a something I was not able to found it in the documentation.

I would like to have in the fields the possibility to hide and show some field (like in the HTTP Adapter when you select the Basic Authetication and the Credential name became visible)

I did not found anything related in the metadata documentation:

https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/component-metadata

Someone can help me on that?

Thanks a lot

Cristiano

entry.title: Duplicate run of integration flow consuming event from event mesh
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a doubt related to event message consumption in SAP Cloud Integration. I am consuming an event topic configured in Event Mesh capability within SAP Integration Suite.

And created a topic subscription in the above queue. This event is sent from S/4HANA Cloud system when a sales order item is changed.

 

I am consuming the event in Cloud Integration process using AMQP sender adapter

 

 

Now when a sales order item is changed in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, I see the iFlow is triggered successfully but there always are two runs in the log:

Also the queue in event mesh is not cleared even after successful completion of the message in cloud integration process consuming the event.

1. Why is it triggering two runs of the same consumer integration process?

2. Why is the queue not getting cleared after integration flow completes.

Best regards,

Sumit

entry.title: consuming SOAP CPI services from S4HANA or Payroll via certified x509 authentication
entry.content:
Currently we have established a SOAP Web service from CPI which is consumed from Sap Payroll, it is required to perform the authentication through the X509 certificate. 

Web Service

SOAMANAGER

Ping

The process that has been done so far is to export the CPI CA certificates to the STRUST in SAP Payroll and in the same way the export of the SAP Payroll own certificate to SAP CPI.

I would like to know if I have to perform any additional process for the authentication of the service through X509 Certificate.

entry.title: Unable to Create/Post STO Purchase order Using BO/API
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We're trying to post a STO Purchase Order using Standard API & same we try with business object, But we get a error of (MessageClass='APPL_MM_PUR_PO',MessageNumber='065'  Short Text = Use a supported purchase order item category for item &. See long text.) 

please help with this to find out the way to resolve this.

 

Link - https://my418769-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_purchaseorder_2/srvd_a2x/sap/purchaseorder/0001/PurchaseOrder

Payload - 
{
    "CompanyCode": "1000",
    "PurchaseOrderType": "UD",
    "Supplier": "1004",
    "PurchasingOrganization": "1000",
    "PurchasingGroup": "003",
    "_PurchaseOrderItem": [
        {
            "Plant": "1007",
            "OrderQuantity": 7,
            "NetPriceAmount": 0,
            "NetPriceQuantity": 1,
            "PurchaseOrderItemCategory": "7",
            "TaxCode": "2E",
            "DocumentCurrency" : "",
            "OrderPriceUnit" : "",
            "PurchaseOrderQuantityUnit" : " "
           
        }
    ]
}

entry.title: Timestamp in SRT_MONI Reflecting When Message Was First Sent Outbound
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

I'm working with data in SRT_MONI and struggling to understand what is the exact field that identifies the moment in which the message is sent out bound.

What is the field that is giving me this information?
Or is there a way I can have that time by adding performance data to 

CREATED_TS

?

entry.title: Duplicate run of integration flow consuming event from event mesh of SAP Cloud Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a doubt related to event message consumption in SAP Cloud Integration. I am consuming an event topic configured in Event Mesh capability within SAP Integration Suite.

 

And created a topic subscription in the above queue. This event is sent from S/4HANA Cloud system when a sales order item is changed.

 

 

I am consuming the event in Cloud Integration process using AMQP sender adapter

 

 

 

 

Now when a sales order item is changed in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, I see the iFlow is triggered successfully but there always are two runs in the log:

 

Also the queue in event mesh is not cleared even after successful completion of the message in cloud integration process consuming the event.

 

1. Why is it triggering two runs of the same consumer integration process?

2. Why is the queue not getting cleared after integration flow completes.

Best regards,

Sumit

entry.title: Mispunch Issue in SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Problem Statement : There is no differentiation between no-punch and single punch in SAP SuccessFactors. So in order to identify the cases which were absent (no punch) and that with single punch are not able to segregate because of which calculation of pay days is affected.

 

We can only receive data when both the punch in and out are received i.e. in pair. Hence need a solution over this. Single punch is however available on standard Timesheet UI to employees but it cannot be stored in database unless it is paired and can only be fetched via API after pairing of records.

entry.title: How to remove leading zeros from Interchange Control Number in Cloud Integration TPM
entry.content:
We have created the SAP Interchange Control Number for many trading partners. If we select the maximum length suppose 5 digits then it appends leading zeros if it starts from '1'. 

Ex: 00001 like this.

We need to remove the leading zeros. Is there any configuration changes in TPM we can do to achieve that?

#SAP Cloud Integration

Thanks,

Ranjan

entry.title: HOW TO RETRIVE more than 2000 records from salesforce in single soql query
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We have a requirement to get records from salesforce to BTP IS. using SOQL query we are only getting 2000 records , but we have more than 2000 records in salesforce . Can you please help here how to retrieve all the records 

The below configuration done in Integration suite :

in processing tab:

  •  TYPE: REST
  • OPERATION: SOQL-EXECUTE QUERY
  • SOQL QUERY: Query has been set

Regards:

Saikumar

entry.title: How to convert xlsx file into xml in cpi
entry.content:
hello Everyone,

i want to read the XlSX file data in BTP IS and conevert into XML

currently we are able to pick the excel file from sharepoint but to failed read the content of excel Since the data becoming binary check couple of blogs but still we could not convert into xml due to missing jar files or some other issue.

appreciate your time help in adavance

Regards,

Saikumar

entry.title: Groovy Script : Generate Dynamic Filename
entry.content:
import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message

import java.text.SimpleDateFormat

 

def Message processData(Message message) {

    def date = new Date()

    def sdf = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyyMMdd_HHmmss")

    def timestamp = sdf.format(date)

    def fileName = "Invoice_" + timestamp + ".pdf"

 

    message.setProperty("dynamicFilename", fileName)

    return message

}

entry.title: PO to BTP - IS Migration : Query parameters in HTTP receiver adapter
entry.content:
Hello all,

I'm migrating an HTTP interface from PO to BTP-IS. Just wanted to know how the query parameters option in PO HTTP receiver can be implemented in HTTP receiver adapter in CPI.

Attaching the PO configuration screenshot for reference.

Thank you,

Aditya
